business.title: Signature Global ties up with Tonino Lamborghini for branded residences project in Gurugram
business.description: Signature Global has partnered with Tonino Lamborghini to launch a premium residential project in Gurugram, marking the Italian brands entry into Indias housing market. The 12.4-acre development in Sector 71 will house over 800 luxury residences, tapping into the fast-growing branded residences segment driven by rising affluence and demand for global lifestyle offerings.

business.title: Singapore Airlines CEO meets Tata Sons Chairman Chandrasekaran
business.description: Singapore Airlines CEO Goh Choon Phong met with Tata Sons Chairman N Chandrasekaran and other executives to discuss the loss-making Air India. The meetings come as Air India faces challenges including increased operating costs due to airspace restrictions and a recent leadership change. The airline's financial performance is impacting Singapore Airlines.

('Sigenergy', Stock Code: 06656.HK) today successfully listed on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange (HKEX), marking a significant milestone in the company's development. The Company is positioned as the first  'AI+ All-in-One PV Storage' company to be listed on the HKEX.
